title: plectranthus prainianus
intro: Plectranthus prainianus, also known as Indian spikenard or Prain's coleus, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Plectranthus prainianus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Plectranthus prainianus is often used as a dried leaf or root extract, and can be administered as a tea, tincture, or applied topically to affected areas.
